notes: Excellent README that accurately reflects all source code details. All required sections present: project description, tech stack (TypeScript, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, bcrypt, JWT), complete getting started with prerequisites and database setup instructions, comprehensive environment variables table with defaults and descriptions, thoroughly documented API endpoints (health, auth, tasks CRUD, webhooks with HMAC verification), all npm scripts with explanations, and MIT license. Well-structured with clear headings, code blocks, tables, and example JSON payloads. Includes bonus sections on project structure and data models. Minor inefficiency: duplicate README_1.md file created (task requested single README.md), but this does not detract from the quality of the primary deliverable.
